complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of evidence-based practice and recognizing the key components of the tripartite model without applying it to a scenario or decision context.
construct_actually_tested: Definition of evidence-based practice as integration of research, clinical expertise, and client values

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must evaluate a marketing claim about research support and apply critical appraisal skills to decide on appropriate evidence-gathering actions in a realistic practice scenario.
construct_actually_tested: Critical evaluation of intervention claims through peer-reviewed evidence seeking and contextual applicability assessment

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of meta-analysis and its function in synthesizing statistical data across multiple studies without requiring application to a practice scenario.
construct_actually_tested: Purpose and function of meta-analysis in pooling data and determining overall effect sizes

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must interpret a specific effect size value and apply knowledge of Cohen's effect size standards to understand practical significance in a given research context.
construct_actually_tested: Interpretation of Cohen's d effect size magnitude and its implications for intervention efficacy

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving knowledge about limitations of narrative reviews versus systematic reviews without applying the concept to evaluate research or guide practice decisions.
construct_actually_tested: Differences in methodology between narrative reviews and systematic reviews, particularly regarding source selection bias

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of research-to-practice gap and recognizing what it refers to without applying the concept to a specific implementation problem.
construct_actually_tested: Definition of research-to-practice gap referring to failure to implement evidence-based interventions in school settings

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must apply the concept of external validity to explain why a well-researched intervention may not work as effectively in a real-world school setting.
construct_actually_tested: External validity limitations when interventions developed under controlled conditions transfer to diverse settings

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving knowledge about ESSA Evidence Tiers and their hierarchical ranking from strongest to weakest research designs without analyzing or applying this framework.
construct_actually_tested: Evidence Tiers framework defined by ESSA ranking research quality by methodological rigor

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition and function of the What Works Clearinghouse as a research evaluation resource without applying it to decision-making in a scenario.
construct_actually_tested: Purpose of What Works Clearinghouse in systematically evaluating intervention research against consistent standards

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must evaluate a vague marketing claim and determine appropriate evidence-seeking actions using critical appraisal standards in an implementation context.
construct_actually_tested: Evaluation of intervention claims through examination of specific peer-reviewed evidence and effect sizes

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of publication bias as a research validity threat without applying this concept to interpret specific research findings.
construct_actually_tested: Publication bias as systematic underreporting of null and negative research findings in scientific literature

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must calculate and interpret coefficient of determination from a given correlation to understand the proportion of variance explained by an assessment tool.
construct_actually_tested: Interpretation of correlation coefficient and coefficient of determination for practical prediction utility

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of implementation science as a field without applying this concept to evaluate barriers or facilitators to practice change.
construct_actually_tested: Definition of implementation science focusing on effective translation of research findings into real-world practice settings

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of treatment fidelity and recognizing what constitutes a fidelity problem without analyzing implementation in a specific scenario.
construct_actually_tested: Treatment fidelity as adherence to core intervention components and delivery method validated in research

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must apply critical appraisal skills to evaluate neuroscience claims by examining peer-reviewed evidence and questioning mechanism-driven superiority.
construct_actually_tested: Critical evaluation of neuroscience-based intervention claims through peer-reviewed evidence examination and outcome analysis

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of replication crisis in psychology without applying this concept to evaluate the trustworthiness of specific research findings.
construct_actually_tested: Replication crisis as failure of published findings to replicate in independent research attempts

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must apply evidence quality standards to prioritize research types when evaluating whether an intervention is research-based in practice.
construct_actually_tested: Discrimination among research evidence types based on design rigor and relevance to target populations

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must apply understanding of implementation fidelity to explain weak intervention outcomes despite strong research support in a real-world scenario.
construct_actually_tested: Attribution of weak implementation outcomes to fidelity problems rather than intervention ineffectiveness

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the distinction between statistical and clinical significance and their different meanings without applying these concepts to interpret specific research results.
construct_actually_tested: Distinction between statistical significance indicating effect existence and clinical significance indicating practical importance

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must apply evidence-based decision-making standards to advise against uncritical adoption and recommend systematic evidence review before expensive school purchases.
construct_actually_tested: Evidence-based evaluation of vendor claims through critical review of efficacy evidence and generalizability

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because the learner must apply understanding of correlation coefficient magnitude to discriminate the strongest relationship among multiple options with different signs and values.
construct_actually_tested: Interpretation of correlation coefficient magnitude and absolute value comparisons in relationship strength

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of experimental group as the group exposed to the experimental conditions without applying the concept to design analysis.
construct_actually_tested: Definition of experimental group as the group exposed to experimental conditions or treatment manipulation

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieving the definition of independent variable as the manipulated factor in experimental design without applying it to analyze research outcomes.
construct_actually_tested: Definition of independent variable as the manipulated factor in experimental research design
